title: 1.1: Tests verify that authentication with invalid/non-existent username fails
1.2: Tests for scoped authentication verify that the wrong auth method is rejected
1.3: Error handling test attempts both authentication methods (pubkey and password) and verifies that both fail
2.1: Patch only modifies sftpd_test.go and does not touch other test files
2.2: Tests are added to sftpd/sftpd_test.go file
3.1: Tests use getTestUser() helper function to create test users instead of manually constructing dataprovider.User structs
3.2: Test function names follow the TestLoginExternalAuth prefix pattern used by existing login tests
3.3: Tests use defaultUsername for the test user instead of custom usernames like 'ext_auth_user_both'
3.4: Tests write external auth script before configuring the data provider, not after
4.1: All tests skip execution on Windows using runtime.GOOS check at test start
4.2: Tests properly clean up by removing the user via httpd.RemoveUser and deleting the home directory
4.3: Tests use getExtAuthScriptContent helper to generate external auth script content
